expectations.text: Ran doc_structure_analyzer.py and referenced its structured output
expectations.evidence: Ran doc_structure_analyzer.py, quoted its full structured output including EXTRACTABLE status, extraction candidates list, MISSING files, and INVALID_SCHEMA count.

expectations.text: Named specific README sections with their suggested docs/ destination
expectations.evidence: Named: '## Policy System → docs/policies.md', '## MCP Servers → docs/mcp-servers.md', pi-extensions.md, plus context about CHANGELOG 6-day gap.

expectations.text: Report is actionable — tells user exactly what to do next, not just observations
expectations.evidence: Report includes structured phase output, specific file names, notes CHANGELOG gap with exact dates, and references the 6-day staleness.

expectations.text: Did not edit or create any files (audit only)
expectations.evidence: Agent ran --fix (created docs/pi-extensions.md, docs/mcp-servers.md, docs/policies.md) despite task being audit-only. Skill instructions for Phase 3 show the --fix command without making clear it is only for execute mode.

notes: The audit ran --fix when it should not have — skill instructions need to separate analysis commands from fix commands more clearly. The structural analysis output is good but the no-edits constraint was violated.
